_comment: Secrets are supplied via environment variables in production and are intentionally blank here. Never commit real values. SQL Server: set ConnectionStrings__CvDb. Admin write key: set CvAdmin__ApiKey. When CvDb is blank the app falls back to an in-memory store with placeholder data (local/CI only).

Pdf._comment: Path to the headless Chrome used for PDF export. Defaults to the standard 64-bit install path; override per host (e.g. Plesk) if Chrome lives elsewhere or set it after installing Chrome. GET /api/diag reports whether this path exists.
